description: BODi is a consumer fitness and wellness service centered on workout and nutrition content. Public developer-facing integration documentation was not found on bodi.com beyond the MCP endpoint.
summary: BODi exposes a public MCP server at https://api.edge.content-mcp-server.prod.bodi.com/gpt-app/mcp with no authentication required; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on bodi.com.
